title: Eva collectors CDs and hidden images
display_title: Eva collectors CDs and hidden images
wikitext:
[]: Eva collector's CDs and hidden images             Quote Post by deeRez » Sun Dec 27, 2020 10:53 am So on the 6th Evangelion Collector's CD, and also the "Collector's DISC LIMITED VERSION 1998 SUMMER", there's a program called EVAWPC.EXE with an EVAWPC.DAT file. The program lets you change your PC wallpaper by clicking one of 5 pictures. It then unpacks the picture from the EVAWPC.DAT file and sets your wallpaper to it. But I got interested in knowing if there's actually more pictures in that .DAT file than the program presents, and yes there is! Presented here are all the pictures. The following are nice because they're digitized scans of the actual cels from End of Evangelion after Asuka throws the ship. They show more on the top and bottom without the widescreen cut off, and are better detailed.

[]: Re: Eva collector's CDs and hidden images             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Sun Dec 27, 2020 11:09 am Ow! There are several interesting images here. The digitized scans of the actual cells from EoE catch my eyes!

[]: Re: Eva collector's CDs and hidden images             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Dec 27, 2020 11:29 am Great find :)

[]: Re: Eva collector's CDs and hidden images             Quote Post by Blockio » Sun Dec 27, 2020 5:21 pm Oh, that's fascinating!

Article: Eva collectors CDs and hidden images
[]: Eva collector's CDs and hidden images             Quote Post by deeRez » Sun Dec 27, 2020 10:53 am So on the 6th Evangelion Collector's CD, and also the "Collector's DISC LIMITED VERSION 1998 SUMMER", there's a program called EVAWPC.EXE with an EVAWPC.DAT file. The program lets you change your PC wallpaper by clicking one of 5 pictures. It then unpacks the picture from the EVAWPC.DAT file and sets your wallpaper to it. But I got interested in knowing if there's actually more pictures in that .DAT file than the program presents, and yes there is! Presented here are all the pictures. The following are nice because they're digitized scans of the actual cels from End of Evangelion after Asuka throws the ship. They show more on the top and bottom without the widescreen cut off, and are better detailed.
